stemHtml: Consider RNAV and RNP system functions. An “offset flight path’’ is…

options.a: A variable lateral offset from a defined route that can be applied for the entire length of the route, including the approach procedure.
options.b: A lateral offset from a defined route, and the offset must be intercepted at an angle of 45 degrees or more.
options.c: A lateral offset from a defined route, which is specified in increments of 1 NM up to 20 NM.
options.d: A parallel path that is offset only to the left of the original active route.
